predicted_return_cluster_report.representative_news_method: Label centroid body_emb_cluster_pc* values are inverse-transformed to the original body_emb_* space, then matched to source news by cosine similarity.
predicted_return_cluster_report.profile_feature_ranking_method: For each label centroid, original-scale feature values are compared against the global profile mean and sorted by absolute z-difference.

representative_embedding_news.title: It’s been another banner year for Today in Energy!
U.S. electric capacity mix shifts from fossil fuels to renewables in AEO2023
What’s driving decreasing gasoline consumption in China?
Electric power sector CO2 emissions drop as generation mix shifts from coal to natural gas
EIA expects higher wholesale U.S. natural gas prices in 2021 and 2022
EIA projects generation from coal and nuclear power plants will plateau after 2025
U.S. electric capacity mix shifts from fossil fuels to renewables in AEO2023
EIA projects total U.S. energy-related CO2 emissions to be relatively flat through 2050
It’s been another banner year for Today in Energy!
EIA expects higher wholesale U.S. natural gas prices in 2021 and 2022
What’s driving decreasing gasoline consumption in China?
EIA projects nearly 50% increase in world energy use by 2050, led by growth in renewables
Summer diesel margins tighten with European supply shift
U.S. propane inventories are well stocked heading into the winter heating season
EIA projects accelerating renewable consumption and steady liquid fuels growth to 2050

volatility_cluster_report.profile_feature_ranking_method: For each label centroid, original-scale feature values are compared against the global profile mean and sorted by absolute z-difference.
